rationale: The citing paper focuses on free-trial acquisition effects on long-term retention, usage, and CLV in a digital TV subscription setting, while the cited paper studies immediate in-store surprise-coupon effects on grocery basket spending and unplanned purchases. With only a DOI-level match and no in-text citation context provided, the evidence suggests possible background promotion literature use but is too sparse to confidently classify as obvious mention-only or clearly substantive.
